Package com.sunilos.p4.tag

Class FormSelect

java.lang.Object
jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.TagSupport
com.sunilos.p4.tag.FormSelect
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.IterationTag, jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.JspTag, jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.Tag, Serializable
public class FormSelect extends jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.TagSupport
Tag creates the HTML SELECT elements <ors:formSelect name="roleId" value="1" list="roleList" />
Author:
Deepak Vishwakarma
